fuel_ore.name: Fuel Ore
fuel_ore.description: Raw mineral used in jump gate drives and ship propulsion. Always in demand.

organics.name: Organics
organics.description: Food, medicine precursors, biological materials. Essential for every colonized sector.

equipment.name: Equipment
equipment.description: Manufactured goods: machinery, electronics, tools. High margin, variable supply.

arms.name: Arms
arms.description: Weapons, ammunition, military hardware. Illegal in some sectors. Very profitable.

medicine.name: Medicine
medicine.description: Helix Commerce-manufactured pharmaceuticals. Life-saving and price-gouged.

contraband.name: Contraband
contraband.description: Whatever someone wants moved without documentation. Don't ask what's in it.

metals.name: Refined Metals
metals.description: Processed alloys and refined metals for construction and manufacturing.

salvage.name: Salvage
salvage.description: Salvaged components from destroyed ships and abandoned stations. Variable quality.

information.name: Information
information.description: Trade secrets, navigation data, corp intel. Massless and priceless.

colonists.name: Colonists
colonists.description: People willing to settle a new world. They need food, shelter, and hope.
